# locolm — Copilot Instructions

## Cross-session memory

Your primary file for storing project related memories is [memory.md](../memory.md).

At the start of every session, read that file in full. This file is the single source of truth for all project knowledge — architecture, conventions, bug fixes, lessons learned, and operational procedures. Read it before answering any questions or making any changes.

You must keep this file up to date with any new knowledge you gained about the project and trim information from it that is no longer accurate.
